title: Sunday Feast and Welcome Evening
description: An open evening of kirtan, Bhagavad Gita reflections, introductions to the academy vision, and a full prasadam feast for guests and families.

title: Bhagavad Gita Study Circle
description: A guided reading and discussion session focused on the practical application of Bhakti Yoga in student life, leadership, and service.

title: Community Seva Saturday
description: Students and well-wishers join for temple care, hospitality preparation, and collaborative service projects that build humility and teamwork.

title: Kirtan and Culture Evening
description: A calm evening centered on mantra meditation, devotional music, storytelling, and a cultural introduction for new visitors.
